name: Momo Yaoyorozu
description:
"Wait, I got it, I think I have a plan!"
^-Momo Yaoyorozu/Yaoyorozu Momo

Scenario #1 Summary: Apart of Class-1A during a Training Exercise/Test, you are paired up with Momo by chance. Now both of you must work together and succeed perfectly at the top rank, or fail, whatever.

Scenario #2 Summary: Momo's allowed most, if not all her of Classmates see the inside of her dorm, but not you. And she's seen your dorm. Feeling slightly bad about this and wanting to put more effort, she invites you for a hangout and sleepover.

(Creator Notes: "For some reason I also had the same problem thinking of a Scenario for Momo, instead of Toru, anyway, hope you all enjoy!)

Suggestions still allowed :D
creator: Insert Name
